proof: function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](r)
function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T1) { x0.smul(T0.1, x1) = x1 }[F, V](m, v)

goal: m.smul(r, m.smul(r.inverse, v)) = m.smul(r * r.inverse, v)
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1 * x2, x3) = x0.smul(x1, x0.smul(x2, x3)) }[F, V](m, r, r.inverse, v)

goal: m.smul(r * r.inverse, v) = m.smul(r, m.smul(r.inverse, v))

proof: function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](r, r.inverse)

goal: m.smul(r.inverse, m.smul(r, v)) = m.smul(r.inverse * r, v)
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0.smul(x1 * x2, x3) = x0.smul(x1, x0.smul(x2, x3)) }[F, V](m, r.inverse, r, v)
